name: Tim Russert
title: Last known photo of Tim Russert, taken on June 11, 2008 — he died of a heart attack at work two days later.
description: Tim Russert was photographed on June 11, 2008, during a taping of "Meet the Press", the program he had moderated for over 16 years. On June 13, while preparing for that Sunday's show at the NBC News Washington bureau, Russert collapsed at his desk from a sudden heart attack caused by a coronary artery thrombosis. Despite emergency efforts by paramedics and doctors at Sibley Memorial Hospital, he was pronounced dead. He was 58 years old. He had just returned from a family vacation in Italy and was in the midst of covering the 2008 presidential election between Barack Obama and John McCain.
bio: Tim Russert was an American television journalist who served as the moderator of "Meet the Press" for over 16 years. He was known for his tough, fair questioning style and deep knowledge of American politics.

location.name: NBC News Bureau, 4001 Nebraska Ave NW, Washington, D.C.
